title: Better Tipped Arrows
description: Enhances tipped arrows by adding lingering potion effects when they hit the ground.
body:
**Better Tipped Arrows** improves the behavior of vanilla tipped arrows by making their effects more intuitive and useful.

When a tipped arrow hits the ground, instead of requiring players to shoot entities directly, it releases a **vanilla-style lingering potion cloud** at the impact location.  
The cloud uses the **exact potion, duration, and amplifier** of the arrow, creating a behavior consistent with lingering potions.

### Features :

*   Works with **all vanilla tipped arrows**
*   Spawns a **lingering potion effect cloud on impact**
*   Uses **original potion data** (type, duration, amplifier)
*   Fully **vanilla-balanced behavior**
*   No custom items or arrows added
*   Server-side safe and lightweight

Perfect for support gameplay, tactical combat, and utility effects without awkward self-inflicted shots.
